creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241680
devel/tl-expected: license update

Hi,

here's the patch to update LICENSE from PD to CC0-1.0, as it's defined here: https://github.com/TartanLlama/expected/blob/master/COPYING

Also, I've moved package files to the Makefile to make portlint(1) happy.

Thank you.
